This method returns the biggest, best representation available.

# fullResolutionImage()

**Instance Method**

Returns a CGImage representation of the asset.

## Declaration

```swift
func fullResolutionImage() -> Unmanaged<CGImage>!
```

## Return Value

A `CGImage` representation of the asset, or `NULL` if a CGImage representation could not be generated.

## Discussion

This method returns the biggest, best representation available.

To create a correctly-rotated UIImage object from the CGImage, you use [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/UIKit/UIImage/imageWithCGImage:scale:orientation:] or [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/UIKit/UIImage/init(cgImage:scale:orientation:)], passing the values of [doc://com.apple.assetslibrary/documentation/AssetsLibrary/ALAssetRepresentation/orientation()] and [doc://com.apple.assetslibrary/documentation/AssetsLibrary/ALAssetRepresentation/scale()].



## Getting Image Representations

- **cgImage(options:)**: Returns a full resolution CGImage of the representation.
- **fullScreenImage()**: Returns a CGImage of the representation that is appropriate for displaying full screen.
